tools.name: list_skills
tools.description: List all available Superpowers skills with their names and descriptions. Use this to discover which skills are available before loading one.

tools.name: read_skill
tools.description: Read the full content of a Superpowers skill by name. The skill content contains instructions, checklists, and patterns to follow. Read a skill before attempting the task it covers.

skill_name.description: Name of the skill to read (e.g. "brainstorming", "test-driven-development", "systematic-debugging")
